description.zh-Hans: 使用多尺度斑块噪波生成苔藓/地衣/有机物蔓生纹理。具有斑块状分布、柔和边缘、分层颜色变化（棕色到绿色），并可选基础表面输入。所有噪波均可平铺。
description.en: Generates moss / lichen / organic overgrowth textures using multi-scale patch noise. Features patchy distribution with soft edges, layered color variation (brown to green), and optional base surface input. All noise is tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 苔藓, 地衣, 有机物蔓生, 青苔, 墙面覆盖
triggers.en: moss, lichen, overgrowth, organic, ground cover

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在基础表面上生成苔藓/地衣蔓生效果，用于旧化岩石或古老建筑。
exampleUsage.en: Generate moss or lichen overgrowth on a base surface for weathered rocks or ancient buildings.
